thesis.title: The Hermit
thesis.hudTelemetry: Map a hyper-precise, stable neon cyan vector coordinate plane radiating outward from a single platinum lantern.

antithesis.title: The Socialite
antithesis.hudTelemetry: Rupture the cyan vectors into a sequence of interlocking, mirrored shadow-lines that mask the core face design.

superposition.title: Schrödinger's Ascetic
superposition.hudTelemetry: Engage a hazy, zero-specular blur filter across the medallion ridges where position and velocity swap metrics endlessly.
